newsitems.title: HANDS OVER is now on Steam!
newsitems.author: m1vaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa.
newsitems.contents: Hello, friends!We have an important announcement: the HANDS OVER Steam page is now live.This is a big new project for our team, where familiar tabletop mini-games become much darker. Take a seat at the table, make your move, use influence cards, bluff, sabotage your friends and try to be the last one standing.Press the next tooth? Trust a friend who “definitely didn’t set anything up”? Play it safe or take the risk?In HANDS OVER, every round can quickly turn into chaos, and one wrong choice can change everything.We are especially happy that HANDS OVER has already been noticed by IGN. This is a big moment for us, but the most important support right now comes from players.If you like the idea of a dark multiplayer horror game about bluffing, luck, and sabotage, please add HANDS OVER to your wishlist.It really helps the game on Steam and shows us that you are waiting for the project together with us.Thank you for your support. Take your seat at the table.
